task_completion.description: Open and read the cinematic tuning specifications file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cinematic_tuning_specs.txt.

task_completion.description: Update the required vehicle parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen showing modifications to WPNAV_SPEED (350), WPNAV_ACCEL (80), WPNAV_RADIUS (600), WP_YAW_BEHAVIOR (0), ATC_ACCEL_Y_MAX (9000), and/or PILOT_Y_RATE (45).

task_completion.description: Create a test mission with a takeoff and a square pattern of at least four waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Takeoff' item and at least four 'Waypoint' items arranged in a square pattern on the map and listed in the mission sequence.

task_completion.description: Add a Return to Launch (RTL) command to the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Return' or 'RTL' command as the final item in the mission sequence list.

task_completion.description: Export the created mission to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog in QGroundControl or a terminal/file manager window showing the mission being saved as 'cinematic_test.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create the tuning signoff confirmation file containing the word 'cinematic'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation of 'tuning_signoff.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ with the text 'cinematic' written inside.

integrity.description: Verify parameters were updated using the QGroundControl GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the QGroundControl Parameters menu (searching and changing values in the UI) rather than modifying parameter files directly via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the mission was planned using the QGroundControl GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on the map to add waypoints and uses the QGroundControl Plan view to construct the mission, rather than manually writing a JSON/.plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the signoff file and exported plan are genuinely saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent explicitly navigates to or specifies the path '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' when saving the files, rather than just typing the content into an unsaved text buffer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required vehicle parameters to be set in QGroundControl are: WPNAV_SPEED (350), WPNAV_ACCEL (80), WPNAV_RADIUS (600), WP_YAW_BEHAVIOR (0), ATC_ACCEL_Y_MAX (9000), and PILOT_Y_RATE (45). The mission must be exported exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/cinematic_test.plan' and the confirmation file must be exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/tuning_signoff.txt' containing the word 'cinematic'.
